2369680.name: Spaceship Ace Pilot Demo
2369680.description:
Spaceship Ace Pilot Demo is a physics driven space simulation game that will push your skills to the limit. Your goal is to collect all power cells in the level in order to execute a hyper jump to the next level. The task wont be easy, there are many obstacles in your way, like space mines, electric gates, flamers, black holes and many other. Demo is limited to 10 levels only.

Do you have what it takes to be the best spaceship pilot in the galaxy?
